name: Double Berry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Line a 12-cup muffin pan with paper liners or spray the bottoms only with cooking spray.
3. In a medium bowl, combine flour, wheat germ, sugar, baking powder, and salt; mix well.
4. In a small bowl, combine orange juice, margarine, and egg whites until well blended.
5. Add this mixture to the flour mixture, stirring just until dry ingredients are moistened.
6. Gently stir in blueberries.
7. Fill muffin cups about halfway with batter.
8. Spoon 1 teaspoon of fruit spread into the center of each muffin; top with remaining batter.
9. Sprinkle additional wheat germ on top if desired.
10. Bake for 20 to 22 minutes, or until golden brown. Serve warm.
Notes:
To freeze, wrap muffins securely in foil or place them in a freezer bag. Seal, label, and freeze. To reheat frozen muffins, unwrap and microwave on High (100% power) about 30 seconds per muffin.
Per serving (1 muffin): About 170 calories, 4g protein, 30g carbs, 1g fat, 5% calories from fat, 0mg cholesterol, 180mg sodium.
